8rccbi.script:
Subject: Your Roadmap for {{Address}}!

Hello {{Owner}},

Most agents show you one path to sell. But I'm committed to giving you the *full* picture, the *real* value you deserve. Here's a look at the complete toolbox, beyond the usual:

1. RETAIL LISTING — top price, but repairs, showings, and 60-90 days.

cglr2m.script:
Subject: Your Cash Offer: Know the Facts!

Hello {{Owner}},

Receiving cash offers on {{Address}} can be an exciting opportunity! But to ensure you truly *Live the Good Life* and make the very best decision, it’s vital to know precisely who you’re dealing with. Some offers are direct, others involve a middleman. My commitment is to provide outstanding service, so here are five essential questions to ask every single time:

1. "Show me proof of funds dated this month." (Real buyers carry it.)
2. "Is your earnest deposit non-refundable, and how much?" (Flippers of paper risk nothing.)
3. "Will you close in YOUR name?" ("Or assignee" in the contract = wholesaler.)
4. "What's your inspection period?" (14+ days = they're shopping your contract.)
5. "Can I call the title company you use?" (Real buyers have one on speed dial.)

Ask these of everyone – including me! I believe in complete transparency, so I’ll answer them and provide proof in my first email. That’s how we build trust and deliver exceptional service.

{{Agent}} · {{Brokerage}} · {{Phone}}
